reference.title: Assembler step options
reference.abstract: Use the Assembler Step Options to edit the ASM step of the ELAXFASM JCL procedure that is included with the product. Before you start, verify that the ELAXFASM procedure is customized for your site. For more information about customizing the ELAXF* JCL procedures, see ELAXF* remote build procedures.

refbody.section: PurposeThe options that you specify on this window are used to generate JCL for the selected procedure. For fields that take partitioned data sets as their value, you can drag a partitioned data set name from the Remote Systems view, view, or Remote z/OS Search results view and drop it in the field. To change the order of partitioned data set names in a field, place the cursor in the field and click Change Order from the menu.
